description:
Operating Area: Greece


Since her debut onto the charter market, Koukles has received nothing but outstanding feedback, with particularly high praise for her captain and chef. With Captain Giannis behind the wheel heading up a fantastic crew and Konstantinos in the galley, you are guaranteed the charter of a lifetime.

Delivered by Azimut in 2008 with a refit in 2021, Koukles is a high-performing yacht that perfectly balances contemporary design and space with comfort. During her 2021 refit her exterior and interior were upgraded as well as her interior redecorated, including the purchase of new linen, beach towels and dinnerware.

She boasts expansive deck space with multiple areas for relaxation, featuring a large foredeck with optional sunshade and sunpads, the perfect area for privacy when at anchor in busier ports. On the flybridge there is more comfortable seating, along with sun pads, a wetbar, a BBQ, a four person Jacuzzi and lounging chairs. This entire area can also be protected by a sunroof when desired. Throughout the yacht there is also an incredible top of the range Sonos sound system, the perfect addition to any onboard special event. Her fully sheltered aft deck offers an additional space for al fresco dining.

Her interior design is by Carlo Galeazzi, with fixtures and fittings in dark wood contrasting with light and modern upholstery – her main salon is open and bright and features a bar and 50-inch TV. She accommodates up to nine guests in one master suite, one VIP, one double and one twin cabin with a Pullman berth. All cabins feature entertainment centers and ensuite bathrooms. Her full beam master suite is exceptionally spacious and accessed via a private staircase, providing extra privacy and seclusion. It has a walk-in wardrobe, and two separate ensuites, one with a large bathtub with a jacuzzi setting, the other with a large shower.

Koukles also features a great list of water toys including fitness equipment, a jet ski, a Seabob, water scooters, SUPS, inflatables and 4m Yamaha tender and more! She has a top speed of 24 knots, and also features zero speed stabilizers to ensure smooth cruising.

Whether parties wish to charter as a couple or with family and friends, look no further than Koukles.

crew.name: Giannis Korros
crew.bio:
Upon receiving his Captain’s diploma in 2011 from the Merchant Marine Academy, Captain Giannis then embarked upon his career in the Hellenic Navy. After this he then quickly advanced on to merchant ships.

His career began on passenger ships before his love of hospitality
then drew him to the world of luxury yachting. He now holds an
impressive track record on board well-known motor yachts such
as Galileo, Turama, Tueq, Libertas, Aspire, Mystic, Karma, Mobius,
and now of course the wonderful Koukles.

An experienced yacht captain, specializing in charters of Greece, he has an incredible knowledge of all of the Greek Islands and knows the Aegean and Ionian seas like the back of his hand. Rest assured guests will get to experience the region’s finest secluded anchorages and bays with Giannis at the helm, accompanied by an exceptional standard of service.

crew.name: Nickolaos Pantis
crew.bio:
Born in Greece, Nickolaos has had a long and varied maritime career. He fulfilled his service in the Merchant Academy of Onassis, working for 10 years in tanker ships. Following this, he moved onto tug ships in 2009, where he stayed for 12 years.

After a long career in shipping Nickolaos took the jump into the world of yachting, where he has happily been for the last two years.

A highly skilled and extremely experienced engineer, he is truly an organized professional, taking great care of Koukles and all guests who come on board.

crew.name: Konstantinos Kamanas
crew.bio:
Born in Piraeus, chef Konstantinos has been a chef at sea for the last eight years and is the reason Koukles’ guests never want to dine ashore.

He began his culinary career many years ago catering for large companies, before then owning his own restaurant in Piraeus. Alongside his native language of Greek, he also speaks English and French.

He produces truly exceptional and varied menus, including specialty dishes such as sushi with the Aegean’s finest fish, and the most delicious vegan and vegetarian food you will ever experience. Rest assured any other dietary requirements will be met with enthusiasm, as he loves and prides himself on creating bespoke menus you will look forward to every day.

crew.name: Dimitris Mitsis
crew.bio:
Born in Ioannina in 1972, Dimitris is an experienced bosun, committed to ensuring the safety and enjoyment of passengers while at sea. He carries out all of his duties with a smile, and assists with the maintenance of Koukles as required.

He has a deep respect for the ocean, having worked at sea for more than two decades, mostly on merchant ships, vessels and luxury yachts, previously working on board motor yachts; Dream B, Panorama and Mobius.

A pleasure to work with, with a great wealth of knowledge, Dimitris is great addition to the crew on board Koukles, and will always go above and beyond to ensure guests have a brilliant experience during charters.

crew.name: Natalia Cvasniuc
crew.bio:
Natalia is detail-orientated by nature with more than 10 years of experience in the restaurant, hotel and yachting industries. She has wealth of experience under her belt in fast-paced hospitality roles, including barista work, silver service waitressing and events, all of which she at excelled at.

Her cleaning skills are exceptional, and she takes great pride and joy in making people comfortable. Natalia is a great communicator, listener and is always full of energy and enthusiasm, possessing excellent customer service skills and priding herself on providing guests with special memories.

crew.name: Maryjane Tugano
crew.bio:
Maryjane embarked on her yachting career in 2016, working on a range of luxury vessels. Since then, she has developed her skills and acquired a fantastic working knowledge of the industry. She is an expert in household services, providing guests with an outstanding experience.

Compassionate, discrete and self-aware, Maryjane always makes guests feel comfortable and relaxed, allowing them to have the best possible time on board Koukles.
